chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 747 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3097/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.3098/2023 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 27.04.2023 Mrs. Farah Deeba, Advocate along with Petitioner <><><><>..<><><><> Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks directions to respondents for his reinstatement in service, as he was serving in police department as Police Constable, who was terminated from his service vide Order dated 01.10.2009. It is alleged that the petitioner preferred departmental appeal against his termination, which was decided by the then Additional Inspector General of Police, Sukkur Region by converting his major punishment of dismissal from service into major punishment of compulsory retirement of service on humanitarian grounds vide order dated 20.12.2019. The appropriate remedy is available to the petitioner before the Service Tribunal, hence, this petition being barred under Article 212 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
